## Pull Request / 拉取请求

### Description / 变更描述

<!-- What does this PR do? Briefly describe the changes. / 这个 PR 做了什么？简要描述变更内容。 -->

### Change Type / 变更类型

- [ ] New feature / 新功能
- [ ] Bug fix / Bug 修复
- [ ] Documentation / 文档
- [ ] Refactor / 重构
- [ ] Other / 其他

### Self-Check / 自检清单

- [ ] `python3 scripts/bias_audit.py` passes with 5/5 PASS / bias_audit 通过 5/5
- [ ] No external dependencies added (Python stdlib only) / 未引入外部依赖
- [ ] No sensitive information (secrets, keys, internal identifiers) / 无敏感信息
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-facing) / CHANGELOG 已更新（如涉及用户可见变更）
- [ ] Conventional Commits message used / 使用了 Conventional Commits 提交规范

### Related Issues / 关联 Issue

<!-- Link any related issues, e.g., Closes #12 / 关联的 issue，如 Closes #12 -->
